name: Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, finely chop the garlic.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except the oil to the food processor.
3. Blend until well combined.
4. Slowly add the olive oil while blending.
5. Continue blending for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Tear romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces and mix with half of the dressing.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, bacon bits, and croutons.
8. Mix thoroughly and serve immediately.
9. Store any remaining dressing in the refrigerator. It will keep for about 5 days but is best if made fresh each evening for dinner.
